abstract: Parent orchestrator skill for matching oncology patients to clinical trials. Dual-source retrieval across ClinicalTrials.gov + ChiCTR (中国临床试验注册中心), criterion-by-criterion eligibility evaluation via LLM subskills, mechanism-aware risk and efficacy contextualization, Goals-of-Care triggering, and a self-contained HTML decision report. Designed for Chinese oncology workflows.
